# Visible Body Boilerplate Fixture

## Quick Answer
This page is a source-derived editorial draft for testing visible-body copy. It uses source material as analysis input, but the visible article body still contains text that should be kept in metadata or review notes instead of reader-facing copy.

## Body
This page is a source-derived editorial draft and should be rejected once the gate checks reader-facing boilerplate. The article should still keep source notes in metadata, but not show this stock disclosure in the visible body.

## Review Notes
Update this fixture only when the visible-body boilerplate rules change.
